# SW golden rs_dense_3x3 (ident quant, ReLU)
# Y shape (1, 4, 5, 24) dtype int8
# Lane0 slice Y[0,:, 0, 0..min(19,W-1)]

cout2: 8 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12 12
